title: Aigent Nakamoto Persona & Memory System Specification
description: Complete specification for how personas store identity data and how conversation memory is managed for personalized AI inference. Designed for replication in other AS-API identity management applications.

architecture_overview.summary: The system uses two persona types (KNYT and Qrypto) stored in separate Supabase tables, activated client-side via localStorage flags. Persona data is injected into AI prompts as contextual system instructions. Conversation history is stored in a user_interactions table and summarized for long-term memory.

layers.description: Supabase tables (knyt_personas, qripto_personas) store structured persona fields per user_id. RLS ensures users can only access their own data.
Client-side localStorage flags ('knyt-persona-activated', 'qrypto-persona-activated') control which persona context is injected into AI conversations.
PersonaContextService reads active persona data and builds structured context objects (identity, crypto, social, investment, experience level).
Context is formatted into natural language system prompt additions, tailored by conversation topic and user experience level.
user_interactions table stores every query/response pair with metadata including conversationId, agentType, and activePersona.
AigentConversationService retrieves recent history (sliding window of 8 exchanges), extracts themes, and builds session context for continuity.
conversation_summaries table stores compressed summaries of older interactions, referenced by conversation_type.

knyt.description: KNYT persona - community/investment focused identity for metaKnyts ecosystem members

KNYT-COYN-Owned.description: Token balance, updated from on-chain reads

qrypto.description: Qrypto persona - general Web3/crypto focused identity
qrypto.note: Qrypto has no investment/digital-asset fields unlike KNYT

persona_activation_system.description: Personas are activated/deactivated client-side. Events notify the system to refresh context.

selected-iqube.description: Currently selected iQube identifier for UI display

custom_events.qryptoPersonaActivated: Fired when Qrypto persona is activated
custom_events.qryptoPersonaDeactivated: Fired when Qrypto persona is deactivated
custom_events.knytPersonaActivated: Fired when KNYT persona is activated
custom_events.knytPersonaDeactivated: Fired when KNYT persona is deactivated
custom_events.privateDataUpdated: Fired when persona private data is manually edited
custom_events.personaDataUpdated: Fired when persona data is updated from connections
custom_events.balanceUpdated: Fired when token balance is refreshed
custom_events.walletDataRefreshed: Fired when wallet connection data is refreshed

sync_service.description: Components subscribe to data change notifications. When persona data is saved, notifyDataUpdated() triggers all subscribers to refetch.

persona_data_sources.description: Persona fields are populated from multiple sources, processed by connection-processors

manual_entry.description: User edits fields directly in Settings UI
manual_entry.flow: UI → usePrivateData hook → blakQubeService.saveManualPersonaData → DB upsert

wallet_connection.flow: MetaMask sign → user_connections table → processWalletConnection → on-chain balance read

invitation_system.description: Pre-populated persona data from admin invitations
invitation_system.flow: Admin creates invitation with persona_data JSON → handle_invited_user_signup trigger → inserts persona row on auth signup

schema.connection_data: jsonb (service-specific data: profile, address, signature, etc.)

context_extraction_pipeline.input: Raw persona data from knyt_personas / qripto_personas tables

PersonaContext.identityContext: string | undefined — e.g., 'User: KNYT: handle, Developer, New York'
PersonaContext.investmentContext: string | undefined — KNYT only, e.g., 'Member since: 2023, Tier: ZeroJ, Invested: $5000'
PersonaContext.cryptoContext: string | undefined — e.g., 'Active on: Ethereum, Base. Interested in: BTC, ETH'
PersonaContext.socialContext: string | undefined — e.g., 'Active on: LinkedIn, Twitter, GitHub'
PersonaContext.fullPersonaData: Complete raw persona object for topic-specific lookups

prompt_injection.description: How persona context is injected into AI system prompts
prompt_injection.anonymous_prompt: The user is interacting anonymously. Do not make assumptions about their background, preferences, or experience level.
authenticated_prompt_structure: Tailor your response naturally to their context without explicitly mentioning that you're using their profile information.

experience_level_guidance.beginner: Explain concepts clearly with examples. Avoid jargon.
experience_level_guidance.intermediate: Provide balanced detail. Use some technical terms with brief explanations.
experience_level_guidance.advanced: Use technical language appropriately. Focus on nuanced insights.
experience_level_guidance.expert: Engage at a high technical level. Reference advanced concepts directly.

memory_system.description: How user prompts and AI inferences are stored and recalled for conversation continuity

schema.metadata: jsonb — structured context attached to each interaction

metadata_schema.conversationId: string — groups exchanges into a conversation session
metadata_schema.activePersona: string — which iQube was active during this interaction
metadata_schema.aiProvider: string (optional) — which AI provider was used (openai|venice|chaingpt)
metadata_schema.preferredName: string (optional) — name used to address user
metadata_schema.visualsProvided: boolean (optional) — whether visual content was included
metadata_schema.mermaidDiagramIncluded: boolean (optional) — whether mermaid diagrams were generated

rls_policies: Users can CRUD their own interactions: auth.uid() = user_id

retrieval_strategy.description: Three-tier fallback for finding conversation history

strategies.name: Native aigent query
strategies.query: SELECT FROM user_interactions WHERE interaction_type = 'aigent' AND metadata @> {conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 8

strategies.name: Legacy learn fallback
strategies.query: SELECT FROM user_interactions WHERE interaction_type = 'learn' AND metadata @> {conversationId}, then filter for agentType = 'aigent'

strategies.name: String search fallback
strategies.query: SELECT FROM user_interactions WHERE interaction_type IN ('aigent','learn') AND metadata::text LIKE '%conversationId%'

theme_extraction_rules.description: Keyword-based topic detection from message content

rules.Bitcoin Runes: text contains 'rune' OR 'bitcoin rune' OR 'btc rune'

user_preference_extraction.likesVisualContent: Set true if metadata.visualsProvided or metadata.mermaidDiagramIncluded

context_formatting.description: How memory is formatted for injection into AI system prompt
sections: ### Previous Conversation Summary (from conversation_summaries if available)
### Recent Conversation History (timestamped user/assistant exchanges, responses truncated to 200 chars)
context_formatting.footer: Continue this conversation naturally, building on the established context.

schema.summary_text: text — compressed summary of older interactions
schema.included_interaction_ids: text[] — IDs of interactions included in this summary

long_term_summarization.trigger: Automatic when unsummarized interaction count exceeds threshold
long_term_summarization.purpose: Prevents context window overflow by compressing old exchanges into summaries

data_flow_diagram.description: End-to-end flow for a single AI interaction with persona and memory

steps.detail: Message captured in chat UI component
PersonaContextService.getConversationContext() → blakQubeService.getPersonaData('knyt'|'qripto') → Supabase SELECT from persona table WHERE user_id = auth.uid()
Extract identity, crypto, social, investment contexts + determine experience level
AigentConversationService.getConversationMemory(conversationId) → query user_interactions with 3-tier fallback → extract themes and preferences
Send to edge function (learn-ai, earn-ai, etc.) with message, documentContext, historicalContext
storeUserInteraction() → INSERT into user_interactions with metadata { conversationId, agentType, activePersona, timestamp }
AigentConversationService.storeConversationExchange() → clears cache for conversationId so next retrieval is fresh
If unsummarized interaction count exceeds threshold, trigger conversation summarization → store in conversation_summaries

name_preference_system.description: Users can choose which name source to use (invitation, LinkedIn, custom)
name_preference_system.resolution_flow: NamePreferenceService.getNamePreference(personaType) → returns effective first/last name based on selected name_source

handle_new_user_personas.action: Creates default empty knyt_personas and qripto_personas rows for new users (if no invitation exists)

handle_invited_user_signup.action: If matching invitation exists, populates persona with invitation persona_data JSON and marks invitation as completed

handle_new_user_registration.action: Creates profiles row with first_name/last_name from user metadata

replication_guide.description: Steps to replicate this system in another AS-API application

steps.title: Create persona tables
steps.detail: Create one or more persona tables with identity, crypto, social fields. Add user_id column with RLS policies restricting access to auth.uid() = user_id.

steps.title: Create user_connections table
steps.detail: Store OAuth and wallet connection data as JSONB. This is the intermediary between external services and persona fields.

steps.title: Create user_interactions table
steps.detail: Columns: id, user_id, interaction_type, query, response, metadata (JSONB), summarized (bool), created_at. Always store conversationId in metadata.

steps.title: Create conversation_summaries table
steps.detail: For long-term memory compression. Columns: id, user_id, conversation_type, summary_text, included_interaction_ids, timestamps.

steps.title: Implement PersonaContextService
steps.detail: Static service that reads persona data and builds structured context objects. Must NOT import React hooks. Include experience level determination logic.

steps.title: Implement ConversationMemoryService
steps.detail: Singleton with in-memory cache. Sliding window of N recent exchanges. Theme extraction from message content. Format memory as structured text for system prompt injection.

steps.title: Implement activation flags
steps.detail: Use localStorage or equivalent client-side storage for persona activation state. Emit custom events on activation/deactivation.

steps.title: Wire into AI pipeline
steps.detail: Before calling AI provider: (1) get persona context, (2) get conversation memory, (3) format both into system prompt additions, (4) after response, store interaction with full metadata.
